global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic 3/4 overhead view of a kitchen table with TWO HVAC quote receipts laid side-by-side on a warm walnut wood table. Both receipts are clearly printed paper invoices with similar layout. The LEFT receipt has a header banner that reads 'MAY INSTALL — OFF SEASON' in clean black type, with itemized line items below (TRANE AC SYSTEM, INSTALLATION LABOR, PERMITS) and a bottom total of '$9,500' in bold black. The RIGHT receipt has a header banner that reads 'JULY EMERGENCY — PEAK SEASON' in red type, with the SAME itemized line items below (TRANE AC SYSTEM, INSTALLATION LABOR, PERMITS, plus 'EMERGENCY DISPATCH FEE') and a bottom total of '$14,500' in bold red. Same equipment, same install, only the calendar varies. The exact dollar values must render legibly. Coffee mug to upper-left, ballpoint pen to side. Soft warm morning light from upper-right. Mood: side-by-side mechanism reveal — same job, two prices, the calendar is the only variable. Photorealistic, shot on 50mm lens, slight angle.

composition.framing: medium close-up, both receipts fill 70% of frame

objects.label: left receipt — MAY INSTALL OFF SEASON
objects.text_content: MAY INSTALL — OFF SEASON ... TRANE AC SYSTEM ... INSTALLATION LABOR ... PERMITS ... TOTAL: $9,500
micro_details: 'MAY INSTALL — OFF SEASON' header banner in black
itemized line items in a neat table
bottom total '$9,500' in bold black, large font

objects.label: right receipt — JULY EMERGENCY PEAK SEASON
objects.text_content: JULY EMERGENCY — PEAK SEASON ... TRANE AC SYSTEM ... INSTALLATION LABOR ... PERMITS ... EMERGENCY DISPATCH FEE ... TOTAL: $14,500
micro_details: same invoice format as the left
'JULY EMERGENCY — PEAK SEASON' header banner in RED
same itemized line items, plus an additional line 'EMERGENCY DISPATCH FEE'
bottom total '$14,500' in bold red, large font
